# Punto Reforma A Coruña

> Custom carpentry, bathrooms, kitchens, painting and full renovations in A Coruña. Spanish and English-speaking team.

> Puntoreforma: reformas, carpintería a medida, baños, cocinas, pintura y coordinación de obra en A Coruña. Equipo en español e inglés. Solicita presupuesto sin compromiso.

## Contact

- Website: https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 910 726 73
- Location: A Coruña, Spain

## Pages

- [Home](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for A Coruña

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería a medida en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-coruna/): Custom carpentry in A Coruña: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves and storage for small and older flats. Materials resistant to Atlantic humidity.
- [Instalaciones antiguas en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/instalacion-electrica-fontaneria-piso-antiguo-coruna/): Aluminium wiring, no earth connection, lead pipes in your A Coruña flat? What to check and how to update outdated electrical and plumbing installations.
- [Pintar un piso en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/pintura-piso-coruna/): Painting prices for a flat in A Coruña in 2026: price per m² and per room, dealing with Atlantic climate damp and professional tips.
- [Precio reforma de baño en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-coruna-precio/): How to renovate a bathroom in an A Coruña building: shared drainage, ventilation shunts, community rules and 2026 prices.
- [Reforma de baño en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-coruna/): Ideas, permits, materials and bath-to-shower conversion in A Coruña. 2026 prices, ventilation solutions and community of owners checklist.
- [Precio reforma de cocina A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-coruna-precio/): Real kitchen renovation prices in A Coruña in 2026: breakdown by trade, price ranges and how the Atlantic climate affects material choices.
- [Reforma de cocina en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-coruna/): Kitchen renovation in A Coruña: layout options for your flat, materials suited to the Atlantic climate, prices and project management.
- [Reforma integral en A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-coruna/): Full renovation costs in A Coruña in 2026: what's really included, permits, project management and realistic timelines.
- [Cuánto cuesta reformar un piso A Coruña](https://coruna.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-coruna-precio/): Price per m² to renovate a flat in A Coruña in 2026: cosmetic, mid-range and full renovation — what each level includes.
